name: Chase Freedom Rise Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn a $25 statement credit after signing up for automatic payments within the first 3 months from account opening and remaining enrolled for at least 90 consecutive days

earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 1.5% cash back on every purchase

other_benefits: Complimentary 6 months of DashPass (DoorDash and Caviar) for first-time activators between 02/01/2025 and 12/31/2027
$10 off quarterly on DoorDash non-restaurant orders (when DashPass is active)

sources.notes: Chase official card page with $25 statement credit welcome offer and 1.5% cash back
Forbes review confirming $25 welcome offer and $0 annual fee
NerdWallet review of Chase Freedom Rise as a credit-building card

notes: Designed as a credit-builder card for those with no credit or limited credit history. Applicants with a Chase checking/savings account with $250+ balance may have improved approval odds. 3% foreign transaction fee applies. DashPass and DoorDash quarterly discount are valuable added benefits for a starter card. Note: Older versions of this card offered $150-200 sign-up bonuses - current offer is $25 statement credit for autopay sign-up. The $25 offer may be considered a low welcome bonus for a Chase card.
